revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 葭之池温泉 |画像 = |コメント = |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[富士吉田市]] |交通アクセス = 鉄道：[[富士急行線]][[葭池温泉前駅]]から徒歩5分。 |泉質 = [[単純温泉]] |泉温 = |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |宿泊施設数 = 1 |総収容人員数 = |年間浴客数 = |統計年度 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = }} '''葭之池温泉…」
revision.text:
{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 葭之池温泉 |画像 = |コメント = |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[富士吉田市]] |交通アクセス = 鉄道：[[富士急行線]][[葭池温泉前駅]]から徒歩5分。 |泉質 = [[単純温泉]] |泉温 = |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |宿泊施設数 = 1 |総収容人員数 = |年間浴客数 = |統計年度 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = }}
'''葭之池温泉'''（よしのいけこうせん）は[[山梨県]][[富士吉田市]]（旧[[甲斐国]]）にある[[温泉]]。
==泉質== *[[単純温泉]]（冷鉱泉） ==温泉地== 富士吉田市街地の外れに、日帰り入浴施設「葭之池温泉」が1軒存在する。本館は、昔ながらの[[茅葺]]の建物となっている。
浴室は、男女別の内湯のみ。併設された食堂では、[[吉田のうどん]]を提供している。
==歴史== [[1856年]]（[[安政]]3年）、創業。戦前までは旅館として営業していた。[[1989年]]（平成元年）1月に改築。 ==アクセス== *[[富士急行]][[富士急行線]][[葭池温泉前駅]]より、徒歩1分。
* [[中央自動車道]][[河口湖インターチェンジ|河口湖IC]]から約12分、もしくは[[富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|富士吉田西桂スマートIC]]から約5分。
*[[東富士五湖道路]][[富士吉田インターチェンジ|富士吉田IC]]から約12分、もしくは[[山中湖インターチェンジ|山中湖IC]]から約15分。 ==外部リンク== * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 葭之池温泉 - 富士吉田観光サイト] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ 葭之池温泉 - 公式サイト] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html 葭之池温泉 - スパ東京]
{{温泉}} {{Onsen-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:よしのいけこうせん}} [[Category:山梨県の温泉]] [[Category:富士吉田市の地理]]

==歴史== [[1856年]]（[[安政]]3年）、創業。戦前までは旅館として営業していた。[[1989年]]（平成元年）1月に改築。 ==アクセス== *[[富士急行]][[富士急行線]][[葭池温泉前駅]]より、徒歩1分。

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = |..."
revision.text:
{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * **Train**: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * **Car**: * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]
{{Onsen}} {{Onsen-stub}}
[[Category:Hot springs in Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[Category:Geography of Fujiyoshida]] [[ja:葭之池温泉]]

revision.text:
{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * **Train**: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * **Car**: * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]
{{Onsen}} {{Onsen-stub}}

'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * '''Car''': * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]
{{Onsen}} {{Onsen-stub}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Images]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * '''Car''': * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]

It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).

{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * '''Car''': * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]
{{Onsen}} {{Onsen-stub}}

== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * '''Car''': * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "単純温泉}}" to "単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}}"
revision.text:
{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * '''Car''': * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. * About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]

The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). revision.text:
{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]
{{Onsen}} {{Onsen-stub}}

{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]
{{Onsen-stub}}

revision.comment: removing the duplicate onsen templates and moving them all to the bottom
revision.text:
{{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}} | access = Train: 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|hot spring|ja|温泉}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|ja|富士吉田市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|ja|甲斐国}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|ja|1856年}} ({{ill|Ansei era|ja|安政}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|ja|葭池温泉前駅}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|ja|富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線}}. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Chuo Expressway|ja|中央自動車道}}. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ}} on the {{ill|Higashi-Fujigoko Road|ja|東富士五湖道路}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]
{{Onsen-stub}}

画像編集
revision.text:
{{日本の温泉地 |名称 = 葭之池温泉 |画像 =Yosinoike.jpg |コメント =葭之池温泉と名前の由来である葭之池。 |所在地 = [[山梨県]][[富士吉田市]] |交通アクセス = 鉄道：[[富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線|富士急行線]][[葭池温泉前駅]]から徒歩1分。 |泉質 = [[単純温泉]] |泉温 = |湧出量 = |pH = |液性の分類 = |浸透圧の分類 = |宿泊施設数 = 1 |総収容人員数 = |年間浴客数 = |統計年度 = |外部リンク = |特記事項 = }}
'''葭之池温泉'''（よしのいけおんせん）は[[山梨県]][[富士吉田市]]（旧[[甲斐国]]）にある[[温泉]]。
==泉質== *[[単純温泉]]（冷鉱泉） ==温泉地== 富士吉田市街地の外れに、日帰り入浴施設「葭之池温泉」が1軒存在する。本館は、昔ながらの[[茅葺]]の建物となっている。
浴室は、男女別の内湯のみ。加温されており、時折浴槽上の器具から加水される。併設された食堂では、[[吉田のうどん]]を提供している。
== 歴史 == [[ファイル:Yoshinoikesuishoukaku.jpg|サムネイル|玄関に掲げられている「翠松閣葭之池温泉」の看板。]] [[ファイル:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|サムネイル|例年１月に[[冨士山下宮小室浅間神社]]にて行われる、葭之池温泉一門による筒粥神事]] [[1856年]]（[[安政]]3年）、創業。戦前までは旅館として営業していた。[[1989年]]（平成元年）1月に改築。 ==アクセス== * [[富士山麓電気鉄道]][[富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線|富士急行線]][[葭池温泉前駅]]より、徒歩1分。
* [[中央自動車道]][[河口湖インターチェンジ|河口湖IC]]から約12分、もしくは[[富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|富士吉田西桂スマートIC]]から約5分。
* [[東富士五湖道路]][[富士吉田インターチェンジ|富士吉田IC]]から約12分。
==外部リンク== * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 葭之池温泉 - 富士吉田観光サイト] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ 葭之池温泉 - 公式サイト] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html 葭之池温泉 - スパ東京]
{{温泉}} {{Onsen-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:よしのいけおんせん}} [[Category:山梨県の温泉]] [[Category:富士吉田市の地理]]

浴室は、男女別の内湯のみ。加温されており、時折浴槽上の器具から加水される。併設された食堂では、[[吉田のうどん]]を提供している。
== 歴史 == [[ファイル:Yoshinoikesuishoukaku.jpg|サムネイル|玄関に掲げられている「翠松閣葭之池温泉」の看板。旅館時代のものかは不明。]] [[ファイル:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|サムネイル|例年１月に[[冨士山下宮小室浅間神社]]にて行われる、葭之池温泉一門による筒粥神事。]] [[1856年]]（[[安政]]3年）、創業。戦前までは旅館として営業していた。[[1989年]]（平成元年）1月に改築。 ==アクセス== * [[富士山麓電気鉄道]][[富士山麓電気鉄道富士急行線|富士急行線]][[葭池温泉前駅]]より、徒歩1分。
* [[中央自動車道]][[河口湖インターチェンジ|河口湖IC]]から約12分、もしくは[[富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|富士吉田西桂スマートIC]]から約5分。
* [[東富士五湖道路]][[富士吉田インターチェンジ|富士吉田IC]]から約12分。
==外部リンク== * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 葭之池温泉 - 富士吉田観光サイト] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ 葭之池温泉 - 公式サイト] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html 葭之池温泉 - スパ東京]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Yoshinoike Onsen]][[ja:葭之池温泉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q109597031]] Wikidata name: Yoshinoike Onsen [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]] | access = Train: 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] (formerly part of [[:en:Kai Province|Kai Province]]), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Udon|qq=}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|qq=|1=Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459659}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in [[:en:1856|1856]] ([[:en:Ansei|Ansei era]] 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|qq=|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|qq=|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|qq=|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].

'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] (formerly part of [[:en:Kai Province|Kai Province]]), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Udon|qq=}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|qq=|1=Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459659}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in [[:en:1856|1856]] ([[:en:Ansei|Ansei era]] 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|qq=|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|qq=|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|qq=|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]

== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Yoshinoike Onsen]][[ja:葭之池温泉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q109597031]] Wikidata name: Yoshinoike Onsen [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]] | access = Train: 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] (formerly part of [[:en:Kai Province|Kai Province]]), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Udon|qq=}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|1=Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459659}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in [[:en:1856|1856]] ([[:en:Ansei|Ansei era]] 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Yoshinoike Onsen]][[ja:葭之池温泉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q109597031]] Wikidata name: Yoshinoike Onsen [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:33, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Hot spring in Japan | name = Yoshinoike Onsen (葭之池温泉) | image = | caption = | location = [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]] | access = Train: 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. | spring_type = {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} | spring_temperature = | discharge = | pH = | water_type = | osmotic_pressure = | lodging = 1 facility | capacity = | annual_visitors = | year = | website = | notes = }}
'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] (formerly part of [[:en:Kai Province|Kai Province]]), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Udon|qq=}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|1=Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459659}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in [[:en:1856|1856]] ([[:en:Ansei|Ansei era]] 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]

== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].

'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] (formerly part of [[:en:Kai Province|Kai Province]]), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Udon|qq=}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|1=Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459659}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in [[:en:1856|1856]] ([[:en:Ansei|Ansei era]] 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]

== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].

'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a [[:en:Onsen|Onsen]] located in [[:en:Fujiyoshida|Fujiyoshida]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]] (formerly part of [[:en:Kai Province|Kai Province]]), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Udon|qq=}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|1=Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459659}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in [[:en:1856|1856]] ([[:en:Ansei|Ansei era]] 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from [[:en:Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station]] on the [[:en:Fujikyuko Line|Fujikyuko Line]]. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the [[:en:Chūō Expressway|Chuo Expressway]]. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the [[:en:Higashifuji-goko Road|Higashi-Fujigoko Road]].
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]

'''Yoshinoike Onsen''' (葭之池温泉) is a {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|WD=Q655311|lt=Onsen}} located in {{ill|Fujiyoshida|en|Fujiyoshida|WD=Q647508|lt=Fujiyoshida}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|WD=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture}} (formerly part of {{ill|Kai Province|en|Kai Province|WD=Q858076|lt=Kai Province}}), Japan.
== Spring Quality == * {{ill|Simple hot spring|ja|単純温泉|1=Simple Hot Springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple hot spring|13=User:Immanuelle/Simple Hot Springs|qq=}} (cold mineral spring)
== Onsen Area == [[File:Yosinoike.jpg|thumb|Yoshinoike Onsen and the nearby Yoshinoike Pond, which inspired the name]] The onsen area is located on the outskirts of Fujiyoshida city and features one day-use hot spring facility, also named "Yoshinoike Onsen." The facility's main building is a traditional thatched-roof structure.
The baths consist of separate indoor facilities for men and women. The attached restaurant serves {{ill|Yoshida Udon|ja|吉田のうどん|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Udon|qq=}}.
== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|1=Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459659}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856}} ({{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei era}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|en|Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|WD=Q8013211|lt=Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|en|Fujikyuko Line|WD=Q5507433|lt=Fujikyuko Line}}. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the {{ill|Chūō Expressway|en|Chūō Expressway|WD=Q1091276|lt=Chuo Expressway}}. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the {{ill|Higashifuji-goko Road|en|Higashifuji-goko Road|WD=Q5754006|lt=Higashi-Fujigoko Road}}.
== External Links == * [https://fujiyoshida.net/spot/22 Yoshinoike Onsen - Fujiyoshida Tourism Site] * [https://japanese-inns-465.business.site/ Yoshinoike Onsen - Official Website] * [https://spa-tokyo.net/z-y-yoshino/index.html Yoshinoike Onsen - Spa Tokyo]
{{Onsen-stub}} {{Onsen}}

== History == [[File:FujisanSimomiyaOmuroSengenShrine Kayu-ura Ritual.jpg|thumb|The Kayu-ura Ritual performed annually at {{ill|Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|ja|冨士山下宮小室浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujisan Shimomiya Omuro Sengen Shrine|1=Omuro Sengen Shrine (Yamanashi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11459659}} by the Yoshinoike Onsen family]] Yoshinoike Onsen was founded in {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} ({{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei era|1=Ansei}} 3). It operated as a ryokan until the prewar era and underwent renovations in 1989 (Heisei 1).
== Access == * '''Train''': 1-minute walk from {{ill|Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|en|Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station|WD=Q8013211|lt=Yoshiike Onsen-mae Station|1=Yoshiike-Onsenmae Station}} on the {{ill|Fujikyuko Line|en|Fujikyuko Line|WD=Q5507433|lt=Fujikyuko Line|1=Fujikyuko Line}}. * '''Car''': ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Kawaguchiko Interchange|ja|河口湖インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawaguchiko Interchange|1=Kawaguchiko interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11141818}} or about 5 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|ja|富士吉田西桂スマートインターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Nishikatsura Smart Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida-Nishikatsura smart interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28690108}} on the {{ill|Chūō Expressway|en|Chūō Expressway|WD=Q1091276|lt=Chuo Expressway|1=Chūō Expressway}}. ** About 12 minutes from {{ill|Fujiyoshida Interchange|ja|富士吉田インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiyoshida Interchange|1=Fujiyoshida interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10954014}} on the {{ill|Higashifuji-goko Road|en|Higashifuji-goko Road|WD=Q5754006|lt=Higashi-Fujigoko Road|1=Higashifuji-goko Road}}.
